name: ngl.
description:
A part of me is actually glad this website is falling off.
Devs don't really care about users.
sometimes, i actually forgot this site just makes my blood boil.
every time I see a favorite creator of mine just has to be banned over nothing. (not even a warning??)
its just actually sad that some mods just had to do all of the work and didnt get paid.
thats prob be it from me
creator: The nurse _ h2
